violations.text: The walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The floor in the fryer area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
The walk-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, gasket is on order. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The walk-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The first bay drain stopper was observed not holding water and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler #1 shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, mold, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Hot water was not available at the cafe hand sink. Hot water must be available at all sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment such as cooking equipment, ice machine, can opener, refrigeration and or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The floor in the walk-in freezer area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
